original_image_tags: A technical line graph plot showing "Atlas IIAS" and "Mode 5 P_I". The x-axis is labeled "Downrange Distance (nm)" with ticks from -5 to 25. The y-axis is labeled "Crossrange Distance (nm)" with ticks from -15 to 15. Two elliptical dashed-line contours are plotted centered near the origin. A legend indicates the larger, outer contour corresponds to "10⁻⁵" and the smaller, inner contour corresponds to "10⁻⁶". Text in the lower right quadrant reads "B = 5,000,000" and "A = 6.30". Grid lines are present.

elements.description: A 2D contour plot labeled 'Figure 20. Atlas IIAS Mode-5 Ship-Hit Contours with A = 6.30'. The x-axis is labeled 'Downrange Distance (nm)' with a scale from -5 to 25. The y-axis is labeled 'Crossrange Distance (nm)' with a scale from -15 to 15. The chart displays two nested dashed contour lines. Text inside the chart area includes: 'Atlas IIAS', 'Mode 5 P_I', and a legend for the contour lines: '--- 10^-5' and '---- 10^-6'. Additional text inside the chart area reads: 'B = 5,000,000' and 'A = 6.30'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the type of visual content (a contour plot), its axis labels and scales, the presence of two nested dashed contours, the legend values (10⁻⁵ and 10⁻⁶), and the specific quoted text ('B = 5,000,000' and 'A = 6.30').
